prompt: I want to explore niche beauty app ideas for 2025. I'm a solo developer with full-stack skills (React + Python) and about 3 months to build an MVP. Research what women are complaining about in Reddit skincare/beauty communities and on Hacker News, then suggest the most buildable ideas ranked by opportunity.
assertions: Ran fetch_reddit.py script (not just web search)
Ran fetch_hn.py script (not just web search)
Generated at least 5 distinct product ideas
Each idea has a 5-row scoring table with all 5 dimensions
Saved report file under reports/2025/ directory
Report file path was communicated to the user
